title: phanera carvalhoi
intro: Phanera carvalhoi, also known as the Carvalho's rattan or rattan, is a species of climbing palm that belongs to the family Arecaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phanera carvalhoi include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of various respiratory issues. Phanera carvalhoi is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and infusible extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
